name: meta-tags-optimizer
description: > Optimize title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph, and Twitter cards for maximum click-through rate. Generates multiple A/B test variations with character counting and SERP preview. Use when asked to "optimize title tag", "write meta description", "improve CTR", "Open Graph tags", "fix my meta tags", "social media preview", "my click rate is low", "title optimization", or any meta tag task.
author: nowork-studio
summary_zh: 帮你打磨网页标题、描述以及社交分享卡片，生成多个 A/B 测试版本，并附带字符数统计和搜索结果预览，适合想提升点击率或优化 SEO 元信息的场景。
